rationale: Section 45.114 establishes a bond, tax, and project database. It references Tax Code §26.08 elections and ad valorem tax rates but does not address homestead exemptions or exemption amounts. No conflict arises from increasing the §11.13(b) exemption.
quote: the results of any election held under Section 26.08, Tax Code, including the ad valorem tax rate proposed by the school district for purposes of the election
_note: Rule concerns database reporting on bonds and tax rates; homestead exemption increase has no operative conflict with this section.
